message:
chore(deps): bump criterion 0.5.1 → 0.8.2 in fp-conformance

Applied dependabot PR #2 directly to main per project policy. Only one
benchmark file uses criterion (`crates/fp-conformance/benches/vs_pandas.rs`)
and the touched API surface (`BenchmarkId`, `Criterion`, `criterion_group`,
`criterion_main`) is stable across 0.5 → 0.8.

Verified: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets` clean.
